politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Our Privacy Policy ("Privacy Policy") helps explain our data practices, including the information we process to provide our Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
WhatsApp LLC
1 Meta Way
Menlo Park, CA 94025
United States of America

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: The types of information we receive and collect depend on how you use our Services. We require certain information to deliver our Services and without this we will not be able to provide our Services to you. For example, you must provide your mobile phone number to create an account to use our Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We require certain information to deliver our Services and without this we will not be able to provide our Services to you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We store information for as long as necessary for the purposes identified in this Privacy Policy, including to provide our Services or for other legitimate purposes, such as complying with legal obligations, enforcing and preventing violations of our Terms, or protecting or defending our rights, property, and users.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We share your information to help us operate, provide, improve, understand, customize, support, and market our Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We use information we have to verify accounts and activity; combat harmful conduct; protect users against bad experiences and spam; and promote safety, security, and integrity on and off our Services, such as by investigating suspicious activity or violations of our Terms and policies, and to ensure our Services are being used legally.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We receive information about you from other users. For example, when other users you know use our Services, they may provide your phone number, name, and other information (like information from their mobile address book) just as you may provide theirs.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can change your Services settings to manage certain information available to other users.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can access or port your information using our in-app Request Account Info feature (available under Settings > Account).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can delete your WhatsApp account at any time (including if you want to revoke your consent to our use of your information pursuant to applicable law) using our in-app delete my account feature.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can access or port your information using our in-app Request Account Info feature (available under Settings > Account).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: We use cookies to operate and provide our Services, including to provide our Services that are web-based, improve your experiences, understand how our Services are being used, and customize them.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: We use cookies to operate and provide our Services, including to provide our Services that are web-based, improve your experiences, understand how our Services are being used, and customize them.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Your information may, for example, be transferred or transmitted to, or stored and processed in, the United States; countries or territories where the Meta Companies’ affiliates and partners, or our service providers are located; or any other country or territory globally where our Services are provided outside of where you live for the purposes as described in this Privacy Policy.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: WhatsApp uses Meta’s global infrastructure and data centers, including in the United States.

identite.quote: You must provide your mobile phone number to create an account to use our Services.
identite.purpose: Création et gestion du compte utilisateur

contact.quote: you may provide us, if permitted by applicable laws, with the phone numbers in your address book on a regular basis, including those of users of our Services and your other contacts.
contact.purpose: Gestion des contacts et synchronisation du carnet d'adresses

compte_auth.quote: You must provide your mobile phone number to create an account to use our Services.

paiement.quote: If you use our payments services, or use our Services meant for purchases or other financial transactions, we process additional information about you, including payment account and transaction information.
paiement.purpose: Traitement des transactions financières et paiements

localisation.quote: We collect and use precise location information from your device with your permission when you choose to use location-related features, like when you decide to share your location with your contacts or view locations nearby or locations others have shared with you.
localisation.purpose: Partage de localisation et fonctionnalités géolocalisées

appareil_technique.quote: We collect device and connection-specific information when you install, access, or use our Services. This includes information such as hardware model, operating system information, battery level, signal strength, app version, browser information, mobile network, connection information (including phone number, mobile operator or ISP), language and time zone, IP address, device operations information, and identifiers (including identifiers unique to Meta Company Products associated with the same device or account).

usage_comportement.quote: We collect information about your activity on our Services, like service-related, diagnostic, and performance information. This includes information about your activity (including how you use our Services, your Services settings, how you interact with others using our Services (including when you interact with a business), and the time, frequency, and duration of your activities and interactions), log files, and diagnostic, crash, website, and performance logs and reports.
usage_comportement.purpose: Analyse de l'usage, amélioration des services et personnalisation

contenus_utilisateur.quote: You may provide us your status if you choose to include one on your account.
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Partage de statuts et contenus utilisateur

communications.quote: When you contact us for customer support or otherwise communicate with us, you may provide us with information related to your use of our Services, including copies of your messages, any other information you deem helpful, and how to contact you (e.g., an email address).
communications.purpose: Support client et communications avec l'utilisateur

contacts_reseau.quote: You can use the contact upload feature and provide us, if permitted by applicable laws, with the phone numbers in your address book on a regular basis, including those of users of our Services and your other contacts.
contacts_reseau.purpose: Gestion du carnet d'adresses et synchronisation des contacts

donnees_tiers.quote: We receive information about you from other users. For example, when other users you know use our Services, they may provide your phone number, name, and other information (like information from their mobile address book) just as you may provide theirs.
donnees_tiers.purpose: Collecte de données via des tiers (utilisateurs ou partenaires)

legal_bases.quote: We require certain information to deliver our Services and without this we will not be able to provide our Services to you. For example, you must provide your mobile phone number to create an account to use our Services.
We collect and use precise location information from your device with your permission when you choose to use location-related features
We use information we have (subject to choices you make and applicable law) to operate, provide, improve, understand, customize, support, and market our Services.

We access, preserve, and share your information described in the "Information We Collect" section of this Privacy Policy above if we have a good-faith belief that it is necessary to: (a) respond pursuant to applicable law or regulations, legal process, or government requests

countries: autres pays où les services Meta sont disponibles
transfers.quote: Your information may, for example, be transferred or transmitted to, or stored and processed in, the United States; countries or territories where the Meta Companies’ affiliates and partners, or our service providers are located; or any other country or territory globally where our Services are provided outside of where you live for the purposes as described in this Privacy Policy. WhatsApp uses Meta’s global infrastructure and data centers, including in the United States.
